zh.lifeSummary: Henry Savile是Henry Savile和Elizabeth de Thornhill的兒子，於1370年之前出生在英國越可爾。他和Eleanor Copley至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1437年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry Savile是Henry Savile和Elizabeth de Thornhill的儿子，于1370年之前出生在英国越可爾。他和Eleanor Copley至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1437年。

nameMeanings.name: Savile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Saville
meanings: English (of Norman origin; Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in northern France of which the identity is not clear, though it is probably Sainville in Eure-et-Loire, so called from Old French saisne ‘Saxon’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Savel , Savell , and Savelle .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Savile was born before 1370, in Yorkshire, England as the son of Henry Savile and Elizabeth de Thornhill. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Eleanor Copley. He died in 1437.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry Savile est né avant 1370, à Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de Henry Savile et Elizabeth de Thornhill. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Eleanor Copley. Il est décédé en 1437.

de.lifeSummary: Henry Savile wurde vor 1370 in Yorkshire, England, als Sohn von Henry Savile und Elizabeth de Thornhill geboren. Er hatte mit Eleanor Copley mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1437.

it.lifeSummary: Henry Savile è nato il prima del 1370 nel Yorkshire, England come figlio di Henry Savile e Elizabeth de Thornhill. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Eleanor Copley. Morì nel 1437.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Savileは1370年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアでHenry SavileとElizabeth de Thornhillの息子として生まれた。彼はEleanor Copleyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1437年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Savile(은)는 1370년 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 Henry Savile(와)과 Elizabeth de Thornhill의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Eleanor Copley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1437년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry Savile nasceu antes 1370, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra filho de Henry Savile e Elizabeth de Thornhill. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Eleanor Copley. Ele faleceu em 1437.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry Savile родился перед 1370 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Henry Savile и Elizabeth de Thornhill. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Eleanor Copley. Он умер в 1437 г.

es.lifeSummary: Henry Savile nació antes de 1370, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Henry Savile y Elizabeth de Thornhill. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Eleanor Copley. Murió en 1437.
